summary: Plan-only inventory assessment for five open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe because none has a complete merge preflight with hydrated comments, resolved bot review findings, Codex /review evidence, and clean applicable checks. Four PRs need maintainer judgment because of active author-followup labels, broad scope, or missing merge proof. One small WhatsApp PR has a concrete contributor-branch repair path.

actions.reason: Active author-followup label plus failing applicable checks and missing merge preflight require maintainer judgment before merge or repair planning.
The PR is not a duplicate and may be useful, but the active author-followup label and incomplete merge proof block merge recommendation.
Active author-followup, a failing proof check, and unresolved review-bot preflight evidence block merge; maintainer judgment is needed before repair or finalization.
The PR is broad and crosses multiple runtime surfaces; job frontmatter requires human review for broad code delta and active author follow-up.
A narrow repair path is concrete: update the contributor branch to restore or replace the failing behavior proof, rerun targeted WhatsApp validation, then re-run merge preflight.

needs_human: #81184 requires maintainer judgment because it is waiting on author and has failing applicable checks without merge preflight.
#81391 requires maintainer judgment because it is waiting on author and lacks complete validation/review preflight.
#81621 requires maintainer judgment because it is waiting on author, has a failing Telegram proof check, and has unresolved review-bot evidence.
#82023 requires maintainer judgment because it is an XL broad code delta with active author-followup status.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #89110 by preserving its narrow WhatsApp typing-suppression change while addressing the failing Real behavior proof and refreshing validation on the contributor branch.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(whatsapp): repair unmentioned group typing suppression proof
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs the contributor branch for #89110 while preserving @Bluetegu's narrow WhatsApp typing suppression fix.
- Restores/updates proof for unmentioned group runs so typing indicators stay suppressed regardless of delivery mode.

## Credit
This repair carries forward the implementation and attribution from source PR #89110 by @Bluetegu.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve credit for @Bluetegu as the source PR author.
